home.title: Steak Festival
home.subtitle: 11, 12, 13, 14, 15 August
home.aboutText: Chianina beef, cooked rare following the ancient Tuscan tradition, is the star of one of the most beloved food festivals in the Valdichiana. Every year, thousands of visitors gather to celebrate this unique gastronomic ritual.
home.grillText: Over 14 meters long — the largest functioning grill in Italy. Every evening, our expert grillers cook hundreds of steaks to perfection, honoring tradition.
home.locationText: Giardini del Parterre, in the heart of Cortona. A unique atmosphere within the ancient Etruscan walls of the city.
home.historyText: Founded in the 1960s, the Sagra della Bistecca di Cortona is one of Tuscany's longest-running and most beloved food festivals.
home.ctaDesc: Book your spot at Tuscany's most beloved festival

ourStory.title: Our Story
ourStory.subtitle: Over 60 years of tradition
ourStory.p1: The Sagra della Bistecca di Cortona was born in the 1960s as a moment of celebration and community for the people of Cortona. What started as a simple communal dinner has grown over the decades into one of Tuscany's most renowned food festivals.
ourStory.p2: The undisputed star is always the same: Chianina beef, a prized cut from the native cattle breed of the Valdichiana, cooked rare following the traditional recipe. A simple preparation that respects the raw ingredient and enhances the authentic flavor of the meat.
ourStory.p3: The grill, over 14 meters long, is the festival's symbol — the largest functioning grill in Italy. Every evening of the event, the master grillers cook hundreds of steaks with the same care and passion as always.
ourStory.p4: After more than 60 editions, the Sagra della Bistecca remains an unmissable event for locals and visitors from around the world, set in the magnificent Giardini del Parterre, with the Valle di Cortona as a backdrop.

stay.intro: Stay in the heart of Tuscany. We have curated a selection of apartments, villas, and hotel rooms in Cortona and surroundings, across Il Casale and Hotel San Michele. Book directly and enjoy the magic of Cortona.
stay.ctaText: Contact us to collaborate with the Sagra della Bistecca and offer special conditions to our visitors.
